title: Mysteries of hypnosis and the self are revealed by the psychology and neuroscience of empathy.

assets.abstract: This article reviews a growing body of research and theory in hypnosis and neuroscience that supports the empathic involvement theory (EIT) of hypnosis (Wickramasekera II, 2001; Wickramasekera II & Szlyk, 2003; Wickramasekera II, 2007c). The EIT is a unified transpersonal theory of hypnosis and the self, which weaves together empathic elements of Dzogchen, neodissociative, neuroscience, psychoanalytic, sociocognitive, and other theories by proposing that hypnotic phenomena are inherently charact

phase_mapping.bridge_rationale: Visionary cosmologies — self-transcendence, mystical experience, numinous, awe, cosmic consciousness.
